CROSS-COMPLAINT HAS PLED FACTS GIVING RISE TO CLAIMS BEYOND LEGAL MALPRACTICE AT PARAGRAPHS 29 - 30, 34 -36. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MAY MAINTAIN A CLAIM FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF AS WELL AS ASSERT THE SAME FACTS AS A DEFENSE. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff / cross-defendant David Handsher and Cindi Fox's motion to compel production of documents is granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. As to request #13, if any documents, or portions thereof, are withheld based on either the attorney client or attorney work product privilege, they shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log. Responsive documents shall be produced within 10 days of notice of this order. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
